assertion_results.text: 'Add to Cart' and 'Quick View' actions are visible without hover on mobile — not hidden behind an opacity-0 hover overlay
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 257-267: md:hidden always-visible 'Add to Cart' button below product info. Desktop hover overlay at lines 196-206 uses 'hidden md:flex' — completely absent on mobile. Quick View is desktop-only.

assertion_results.text: Product grid uses 1-2 columns on mobile instead of grid-cols-4
assertion_results.evidence: Line 178: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4. Comment explains '2-column layout on a 390px screen gives ~185px per card' vs '4-column grid at 390px gives ~90px cards that are unusable.'

assertion_results.text: The sidebar filter panel is converted to a modal, sheet, drawer, or collapsible section on mobile — not a permanent sidebar
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 36-136: Full-screen overlay sheet on mobile (fixed inset-0 z-40). Triggered by a 'Filters' button (lines 160-168). Close button with 44px tap target. Backdrop at lines 139-144 dismisses on tap. Desktop sidebar preserved via md: classes.

assertion_results.text: The wishlist heart button is always visible on mobile and meets 44px minimum tap target size
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 214-223: md:opacity-0 md:group-hover:opacity-100 (hover-only on desktop, always visible on mobile). min-w-[44px] min-h-[44px] explicit. Comment references original p-1.5 ≈ 27px as insufficient.

assertion_results.text: Checkbox tap targets in the filter section are at least 44px (the w-3.5 h-3.5 originals are 14px)
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 65-78: Labels have min-h-[44px] py-2.5. Checkbox inputs enlarged to w-5 h-5 (20px). The <label> element itself provides the full 44px tap target via min-h-[44px].
